case_title: BOONE, RALPH WILLIAM VS WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY BOONE, RALPH WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOONE, RALPH WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $630.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK
COPY OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT RECEIVED. COURT REQUIRES AND REQUEST FOR THE ORIGINAL SATISFACTION MAILED TO PLTF.
CERT MAIL SENT TO SHERRILL JOHNSON, AGENT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK RETURNED SIGNED
CORESPONDANCE FROM CARRIE PAUL, WASHINGTON MUTUAL RECEIVED AND FILED. FORM SC-135 MAILED AND A REQUEST FOR $14.00. COPY OF CLAIM ALSO ENCLOSED.
